purpose: Layered index of the full corpus. Read at boot to understand what exists without re-reading 200+ files.

layer_0_folders.core_docs/: SOURCE OF TRUTH. Read-only fuel. Never modified by the system. 224 files total.
layer_0_folders.core_docs/BOOTPACK_THREAD_A_v2.60.md: Standalone A0 bootpack (v2.60, older than embedded v2.62 in megaboot). 828 lines.
layer_0_folders.core_docs/BOOTPACK_THREAD_B_v3.9.13.md: Standalone Thread B bootpack (same version as embedded in megaboot). 1955 lines. THE enforcement law.
layer_0_folders.core_docs/a2_runtime_state/: 4 structural indexes from a prior A2 session. Audit logs and memory maps.
layer_0_folders.core_docs/a2 hand assembled docs/A2_UPDA: A2 brain: intent manifest, episode 01 working log, working upgrade context. 3 files.
layer_0_folders.core_docs/a2 hand assembled docs/uploads: 40 files. The admissibility stack: 18 CANON specs + 11 CANON contracts + rosettas + LEGACY + NONCANON notes. HIGH QUALITY ORE for A1.
12 files. 9 extraction passes + 3 directed extractions from upgrade conversations.
51 Python sim scripts. Prior sim evidence. Covers Axis 0, 3, 4, 5, 6, 12, terrain8, operator roles, ultra stacks.
62 JSON result files. Structured output from simpy runs. SIM_CATALOG indexes them.
10 top-level spec/fuel docs (MEGABOOT, AXES_MASTER, AXIS0 options, etc.)
layer_0_folders.core_docs/high entropy doc/: 8 raw docs. Apple notes, thread saves, Grok/Gemini digest, holodeck docs. QUARANTINE tier.
layer_0_folders.work/ratchet_core/: THE MACHINE. 14 Python files + 25 sims + binding JSON. All verified.
layer_0_folders.work/a2_state/: 5 files. memory.jsonl (57 entries), fuel_queue.json (306 entries), rosetta.json, doc_index.json (this file), constraint_surface.json.
layer_0_folders.work/system_specs/: 14 design docs. All current, CI-verified, dated.
layer_0_folders.archive/: Stale specs from prior sessions. Read-only.

layer_1_a2_brain.A2_INTENT_MANIFEST_v1.md: Core principles. Constraint-driven ratchet validator. Induction primary. No implicit mode switching. No narrative smoothing. Append-only brain. Never canonize. Never simulate. Never rewrite history.
layer_1_a2_brain.A2_EPISODE_01_WORKING_LOG.md: CRITICAL DOC. Failure modes of the system itself. Core realization: declaration is not persistence, noncommutation makes compression dangerous, thickness > elegance early. L0/L1 structural graveyard: killed automata/boolean/group as substrates, density operators conditional survivor. Probe-induced equivalence (a=a iff a~b). 6 parallel tracks merged into super-convergence. 1032 lines.
layer_1_a2_brain.A2_WORKING_UPGRADE_CONTEXT_v1.md: Full working context. Core constraints (finitude + noncommutation as operational, not philosophical). Thread layering (A2/A1/A0/B/SIM). ZIP protocol. L0→L1 structural deepening. Artifact registry. Constraint ladder integration. 810 lines.
layer_1_a2_brain.A2_LOW_ENTROPY_LIBRARY_v4.md: Canon state snapshot. 15 entries. Only finitude + noncommutation installed in B. No algebra/topology/axes/engines in canon. Probe infrastructure exists. Equality not primitive. 215 lines.

layer_1_megaboot.MEGABOOT_RATCHET_SUITE_v7.4.9-PROJECTS 2: THE MEGABOOT. 3051 lines. CANON authority. Contains: Section 0 (definitions, sacred heart, thread topology, ZIP protocol, save levels, graveyard discipline, campaign tape, anti-classical leakage). Section 0.1 (reboot kit). Section 0.2 (readability/rosetta). Section 0.3 (mining artifacts). Section 0.4 (foundation roadmap: Track G/Q/A). Section 0.5 (migration/graveyard). Section 0.6 (massive batching). Section 0.7 (debug). Section 0.8 (axis semantics). Sections 1-8 (project/boot/restore/save/seal/introspection). Section 9 (embedded bootpacks: A1 v1.0, A0 v2.62, B v3.9.13 with full enforcement rules).

layer_1_axis_specs.AXES_MASTER_SPEC_v0.2.md: CANON. Axes 0-6 = functions on constraint manifold M(C). Build order 0→6→5→3→4→(1×2). Axis-3 is ONLY engine-family split. Guardrails: Axis-4 ≠ Axis-6. 66 lines.
layer_1_axis_specs.CANON_GEOMETRY_CONSTRAINT_MANIFOLD_SPEC_: CANON. Geometry = constraint manifold M(C). Exists BEFORE axes. Axes are slices, not primitives.
layer_1_axis_specs.AXIS_FOUNDATION_COMPANION_v1.4.md: NONCANON overlay. Topology4 (open/closed × euler/lagrange). Terrain8 = Topology4 × Flux2. 8 operator roles (Jung mapping). QIT generators for 4 stages. Hopf/Bloch/S3 placement. Heavy math.
layer_1_axis_specs.AXIS0_SPEC_OPTIONS_v0.1.md: 4 candidate Axis-0 definitions: MI spread, local/global ratio, coherent info, boundary bookkeeping. i-scalar clock.
layer_1_axis_specs.AXIS0_SPEC_OPTIONS_v0.2.md: Refined. Full QIT notation. Shell formalization. jk fuzz as Kraus-history expansion. Ratcheting order defined.
layer_1_axis_specs.AXIS0_SPEC_OPTIONS_v0.3.md: Most rigorous. Four option families with explicit derivative classifiers. Simulation recipe included.
layer_1_axis_specs.AXIS0_PHYSICS_BRIDGE_v0.1.md: NONCANON. Physics→QIT bridge. Shells as coarse-grainings. No primitive time. Path integral via Kraus histories.

layer_2_constraint_ladder.summary: The admissibility stack. 18 CANON specs forming strict dependency chain + 11 CANON contracts + 3 rosettas + LEGACY + NONCANON. This is the HIGH QUALITY ORE for A1 — already structured with ASSUME/DERIVE/OPEN tags and constraint IDs. Still needs A1 processing (jargon stripping, B-grammar reformulation). Presumed to have errors.
layer_2_constraint_ladder.dependency_chain: CAS → SAA → RTA → OBA → CMD → (GEA → MTA → COA → DMA) + (AFA → ASA → ORA, CPA) + (CCA, DCA, YCA) → DAB → CP

canon_admissibility_specs.CAS (COSMOLOGICALLY_CONSTRAINT_ADMISSIBL: ROOT. CAS01-CAS20. Finitude, noncommutation, no primitive identity/equality. The absolute foundation.
canon_admissibility_specs.SAA (STATE_ABSTRACTION_ADMISSIBILITY): State as admissible abstraction. Generation contract template.
canon_admissibility_specs.RTA (RELATIONAL_TRANSPORT_ADMISSIBILITY): RTA01-RTA22. Transport as explicit binary relation. Partial, non-reflexive, non-symmetric, non-transitive by default.
canon_admissibility_specs.OBA (OBSTRUCTION_ADMISSIBILITY): OBA01-OBA22. Obstruction = failure of transport trivialization. Finite witnessed claims.
canon_admissibility_specs.CMD (CONSTRAINT_MANIFOLD_DERIVATION): CMD01-CMD20. Derives global carrier M from transport + obstruction. Path tokens, compatibility.
canon_admissibility_specs.GEA (GEOMETRY_ADMISSIBILITY): GEA01-GEA17. No metric primitives. No coordinates. No dimension assertions.
canon_admissibility_specs.MTA (METRIC_ADMISSIBILITY): MTA01-MTA18. Nonnumeric value tokens. No triangle inequality, no symmetry, no reflexivity.
canon_admissibility_specs.COA (COORDINATE_ADMISSIBILITY): COA01-COA16. Coordinates are removable representation layers only.
canon_admissibility_specs.DMA (DIMENSIONALITY_ADMISSIBILITY): DMA01-DMA16. Nonnumeric dimension tokens. No primitive rank or basis.
canon_admissibility_specs.AFA (AXIS_FUNCTION_ADMISSIBILITY): AFA01-AFA15. Functions as explicit F(x,v). Partial by default. No axes/coordinates/ordering.
canon_admissibility_specs.ASA (AXIS_SET_ADMISSIBILITY): ASA01-ASA16. No coordinate system, frame, basis, global parameterization.
canon_admissibility_specs.ORA (ORTHOGONALITY_ADMISSIBILITY): ORA01-ORA16. No metric/norm/inner product. No symmetry/reflexivity/transitivity.
canon_admissibility_specs.CCA (COMPOSITION_CLASS_ADMISSIBILITY): CCA01-CCA18. No algebraic structure by default. No closure/totality/associativity/identity/invertibility.
canon_admissibility_specs.DCA (DUALITY_CLASS_ADMISSIBILITY): DCA01-DCA16. No ontological duality. No involution by default.
canon_admissibility_specs.YCA (CYCLE_CLASS_ADMISSIBILITY): YCA01-YCA17. Cycle is purely structural. No temporal recurrence, no engine semantics.
canon_admissibility_specs.DAB (DYNAMICAL_ADMISSIBILITY_BOUNDARY): DAB01-DAB12. FIREWALL. No dynamics admitted yet. No time, probability, causality, optimization.
canon_admissibility_specs.CP (CANDIDATE_PROPOSAL): CP01-CP20. Meta-spec: how to propose new structures against the frozen stack. Non-backflow guarantee.

canon_contracts.Topology: 24 constraints. Compatibility, adjacency, neighborhoods. No symmetry/transitivity by default.
canon_contracts.Path: 24 constraints. Finite encoded sequences. Not temporal evolution. No closure under concatenation.
canon_contracts.Engine: 24 constraints. Cycles + explicit closure witness + obstruction witness. Not thermodynamic engines.
canon_contracts.Entropy: 24 constraints. Scalar functionals. No monotonicity/additivity by default. Not thermodynamic entropy.
canon_contracts.Transport: 24 constraints. Structural mapping. Not time evolution or motion.
canon_contracts.Curvature: 24 constraints. Obstruction/holonomy. Not Riemannian curvature. Transport path-dependence.
canon_contracts.Rosetta: 24 constraints. Overlays cannot modify kernel. Removable annotations only.
canon_contracts.Simulation Protocol: 24 constraints. Cannot modify kernel admissibility. Replay from execution tapes.
canon_contracts.Physics Rosetta: 24 constraints. Physics interpretations non-binding. No kernel scalar = physical quantity.
canon_contracts.Cognition Rosetta: 24 constraints. No kernel objects = cognitive systems. No Jungian labels in kernel.
canon_contracts.Game Theory Rosetta: 24 constraints. No kernel objects = players/strategies. No rationality axioms required.

legacy_and_noncanon.Base constraints ledger v1: LEGACY. BC01-BC12. Superseded by CAS. Still useful provenance.
legacy_and_noncanon.REFINEMENT_CONTRACT_v1.1: LEGACY. R1-R8 (20 constraints). Superseded by formal canon specs.
legacy_and_noncanon.Constraints.md: NONCANON. Entropic monism, emergent identity, allowable math charter, unknowns register.
legacy_and_noncanon.Constraints. Entropy.md: NONCANON. Path entropy functional, i-scalar construction, proto-engines.
legacy_and_noncanon.Axis 0.md through Axis 4 vs 5.md: NONCANON NOTES. Axis math explorations, QIT generators, corrections.

layer_2_upgrade_docs.summary: 12 files. Progressive extraction of upgrade intent from extended conversations. Each pass preserves ambiguity and contradiction.
layer_2_upgrade_docs.key_content: Thread architecture (A1/A0/B/SIM), ZIP protocol, graveyard philosophy, SIM pipeline, A1 modes, failure analysis. Directed extractions fill 6 specific gaps: ZIP enumeration (9 types), batch scale, sharding, FULL+ confirmation, FULL++ confirmation, phase transition signals.

layer_2_sim_archive.summary: 51 Python scripts + 62 JSON result files. Prior sim evidence from the user's model. These are FUEL — they demonstrate what was tested and what metrics matter. They are NOT validated by the ratchet yet.

axis_0.domain: AB coupling, mutual information, S(A|B), trajectory correlation, history recovery
axis_0.metrics: MI_init/final/traj, SAgB_init/final/traj, neg_SAgB_frac, MI_lambda_fit, reconstruction error

axis_3.domain: Chirality/sign, Berry flux, terrain x sign response
axis_3.metrics: berry_flux_approx (+/-2pi), chirality (+/-1), entropy_mean, purity_mean per terrain

axis_4.domain: Sequence order, FWD/REV, C∘R vs R∘C (operator ordering)
axis_4.metrics: purity, vn_entropy per direction and polarity

axis_6.domain: Left/right operator action, UP/DOWN precedence, Ti/Te/Fi/Fe
axis_6.metrics: delta_trace_mean, comm_norm_mean per operator role, vn_entropy/purity per stage x axis6

axis_12.domain: Topology constraints, channel realization, Topology4 channel families
axis_12.metrics: edge constraints (SENI/NESI), deltaH, lin_err per topology regime

multi_axis.metrics: Combined: MI, SAgB, Berry flux, stage16 deltas, axis6 patterns

history_variants.domain: History operator ordering, gradient scans, invariant probes
history_variants.note: Some are placeholders with random values — real math not yet implemented

simson_structure.format: JSON with root-level params (n_vec, theta, cycles, seeds) + metrics objects
simson_structure.no_pass_fail: None define explicit pass/fail. Thresholds must be inferred from metrics.
simson_structure.axis_coverage: Axis 0, 3, 4, 5, 6, 12, multi-axis ultras, neg-controls, parameter sweeps

layer_3_high_entropy.grok unified phuysics nov 29th.txt: E2-E3. 407K chars, 6599 lines. THE FULL PHYSICS MODEL as of Nov 2025. One-stuff one-force entropic monism. 4→8→16 type hierarchy from pure randomness. Cosmology (sequential bubble multiverse, white holes = supervoids = Big Bang). Dark sector (DM = negative entropy loops, DE = positive entropy divergence). The 4 operators (Te=gradient descent, Ti=eigenvalue solver, Fe=phase locking, Fi=resonant standing wave). S3 manifold with Weyl spinors for global chirality. Win/lose game mapping. Consciousness as Turing machine + oracle. AI alignment via entropy oracle. CORE IDEAS STRONG but ratchet/axis connections may be outdated since Nov.

layer_3_high_entropy.Leviathan v3.2 word.txt: E3. 281K chars, 2204 lines. The Leviathan/Recursive Freedom Framework — the user's full social operating system. Decentralized anarcho-capitalist governance, delegated proxy voting, semantic computing (LevOS), cooperative economics, Ugly Mirror self-assessment, Paladin system, recursive scientific methodology. Scales from cooperatives to Kardashev civilizations. Philosophical basis: Hobbes, Hume, Confucius, Jung, Machiavelli, Sun Tzu. THIS IS THE BROADER CONTEXT the physics model sits inside.

layer_3_high_entropy.grok toe redo save.txt: E2. 141 lines. The FULL Grok TOE X thread (Nov 11, 2025). Where the core cosmological ideas were first articulated: ijk as 3 time dimensions (j,k = probability spaces), white noise on hypersphere as initial universe, retrocausal multiverse (many futures create present, not branching but CONVERGING), gravity = converging possibilities (inverse square = square of possibilities), spacetime IS entropy, dark energy = positive entropy = first, dark matter = negative entropy = micro-GW loops from parent universe, supervoids = singularities of Big Bang = white holes, matter = stabilized spacetime bubbles from dark matter, Bekenstein bound as universe size limit, evolved Boltzmann brain as retrocausal god. SOURCE for PHYSICS_FUEL_DIGEST.
